loops.title: Decision Content Flywheel
loops.purpose: Pick and improve one real buyer-decision cluster at a time, usually a same-workflow comparison plus its tool pages and parent hubs.
loops.cadence: Run whenever starting monetizable content work.
when_to_run: A comparison, tool page, category hub, or buyer guide needs a next best target.
The team wants growth work that also improves trust and source coverage.
steps: Pick one valid same-workflow cluster.
Verify current facts before editing.
Improve the decision page and related tool records.
Update parent hubs, top-layer pages, source registry, LLM surfaces, and ledger rows.
Run loop verification and route QA.
Record the run.
review_questions: Did the chosen pair share a real buyer job and workflow?
Did parent hubs and ledger rows move with the child page?
Did route QA cover mobile, tablet, and desktop?
Was the run recorded in .agent/loop-runs?

loops.title: Freshness Loop
loops.purpose: Turn stale verification dates, due review windows, and baseline pages into an oldest-first refresh queue.
loops.cadence: Run before broad editorial refresh work and at least weekly.
when_to_run: A tool, category, or comparison page may have stale facts.
The team wants the next refresh target without guessing.
steps: Find facts due now or soon.
Find old verification candidates and baseline pages.
Prioritize pages with comparison impact.
Refresh one page or cluster with current sources.
Update sources, parent hubs, and ledger rows.
Record the refresh.
review_questions: Is the top queue item actually commercially or editorially important?
Can the facts be verified from current primary sources?
Did the ledger date represent the true refresh scope?

loops.title: Trust And Provenance Loop
loops.purpose: Find unsupported claims, weak source metadata, pricing provenance gaps, stale facts, and source-registry drift.
loops.cadence: Run before and after source-heavy content work.
when_to_run: Pricing, model, availability, source, or commercial claims changed.
The site needs a trust debt pass without choosing new content.
steps: Audit provenance and pricing metadata.
Audit source registry health.
Audit stale facts.
Fix metadata or open a focused refresh task.
Rerun changed-file provenance checks.
review_questions: Is each volatile claim tied to a source and date?
Are high-volatility facts scheduled for review?
Did any source URL or trust tier drift?

loops.title: Revenue And Conversion Loop
loops.purpose: Verify commercial CTAs, affiliate disclosure, tracking attributes, CTA labels, and buyer-path clarity.
loops.cadence: Run after rendered commercial surfaces change and before deploys.
when_to_run: Affiliate links, pricing, CTAs, guides, tool pages, or comparison pages changed.
The team wants to improve revenue without weakening trust.
steps: Build or reuse fresh static output.
Audit tracked commercial CTAs.
Check disclosure proximity and label clarity.
Fix missing or generic CTA surfaces.
Rerun route QA on affected pages.
review_questions: Is every commercial CTA honest and useful?
Is the disclosure close to the buying decision?
Are placement, tool slug, page type, and event names tracked?
record_targets: final report for changed commercial surfaces

loops.title: Quality Pruning Loop
loops.purpose: Find thin content, duplicate pages, false-vs candidates, stale internal links, and pages that should be deleted, merged, or rebuilt.
loops.cadence: Run after large content batches and before choosing new content expansion.
when_to_run: The site has accumulated low-value pages.
Comparison policy or category taxonomy changes.
steps: Audit site KPIs and comparison quality.
Classify issues as delete, merge, refresh, or keep.
Remove false-vs routes and public links.
Regenerate backlog and ledger.
Record the pruning decision.
review_questions: Should this page exist as a standalone route?
Does it satisfy a real buyer intent?
Would deletion improve the site more than a thin refresh?

loops.title: Performance And UX Loop
loops.purpose: Check build output budgets, route indexability, commercial rendered output, and mobile/desktop layout risk.
loops.cadence: Run after layout, component, style, runtime, search, or rendered-output changes.
when_to_run: Rendered UI, templates, CSS, search, Pagefind, or public assets changed.
Build time or route QA feels slow or brittle.
steps: Build or reuse fresh static output.
Audit dist budgets and indexability.
Run exact route QA for affected routes.
Fix overflow, missing metadata, or payload growth.
Record timing and residual risk.
review_questions: Did the affected routes pass mobile, tablet, and desktop QA?
Did build output budgets or search payloads grow?
Is a full build justified or is exact route QA enough?

loops.title: News And Market Change Loop
loops.purpose: Check news rendering, recent news cross-links, and market-change queues so product shifts reach affected tool and category pages.
loops.cadence: Run during news catch-up work and after important AI product announcements.
when_to_run: New AI product news may affect tool, company, category, or comparison pages.
News pages, OG cards, or affected-tool references changed.
steps: Audit news rendering and OG assets.
Audit affected-tool cross references.
Decide whether the market change needs a news item, tool refresh, category update, comparison update, or no action.
Update source-backed pages and crawl surfaces.
Record the decision.
review_questions: Does the market change affect a buying decision?
Which existing pages need updates beyond the news article?
Are OG assets, affected-tool links, and source lists complete?
record_targets: PAGE_REFRESH_LEDGER.md for hubs and crawl surfaces
